creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I am in the process of updating to 4.0.11 which will rely on GCC and set 
and maintain the proper rpath for libgomp and others, so that your 
problems with outdated base gomp should be solved by then. See 
ports/178206 for details on how I will be doing it.
